pi_items.source: setup_task.sh Ruby script and SQL insertions which explicitly name the experiment 'Vorinostat Efficacy Study VR-01'.

privileged_info_summary: The data is synthetically generated via setup scripts. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/vorinostat_experiments.txt. The exact names of the expected experiments created in the database are 'Vorinostat Efficacy Study VR-01', 'PK Profile - Group 4', and 'Toxicity Screening 2024', contradicting the metadata which omitted 'Vorinostat' from the first experiment's name.
